center.name: 德拉圖什
center.summary: 德拉圖什是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括白斑尾柳莺，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: Kloss's leaf warbler (Phylloscopus ogilviegranti) is a leaf warbler found in Cambodia, China, Laos, Thailand, and Vietnam

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: Kloss's leaf warbler (Phylloscopus ogilviegranti) is a leaf warbler found in Cambodia, China, Laos, Thailand, and Vietnam
